loading.example: Lightweight, purely visual inline spinner and overlay components that adapt to any context via currentColor inheritance and predefined or custom sizes.

overlay.fullscreen-description: Covers the entire viewport. Click to dismiss.

loading.sample-content: This content is behind the overlay and cannot be interacted with while loading is active.

service.label: Service
service.description: Uses LoadingService to show and hide the fullscreen overlay programmatically. Auto-dismisses after 3 seconds.
